stimulus: Before it opened a major new wing in 2011, the Cleveland Museum of Art was only able to display about 10% of its permanent collection. ______blank the museum is able to display close to 40% of its collection.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. "Today" logically signals that the information in the sentence—that the museum is able to display close to 40% of its collection—is true of the Cleveland Museum of Art as it exists in the present day, after the previously mentioned opening of the major new wing in 2011.

Choice A is incorrect because "additionally" illogically signals additional information about the museum before the new wing opened. Instead, the sentence is about the museum after the wing opened. Choice B is incorrect because "for example" illogically signals an example. Instead, the sentence is about the museum after the new wing opened. Choice D is incorrect because "nevertheless" illogically signals that the information is true despite the previous information. Instead, the sentence is about the museum in the present day after the new wing opened.
